description: Renault Commercial Roumanie S.R.L., DBA Dacia, is a Romanian automotive company engaged in the production and distribution of passenger and commercial vehicles. The company operates as a manufacturer and distributor, offering a range of vehicles and providing services such as vehicle financing, trade-in options, and maintenance contracts. Dacia also offers electric and mild hybrid vehicles, participates in government programs for environmentally friendly vehicles, and maintains a network of authorized dealers and an online platform for vehicle sales. The company is part of the Renault Commercial Group and is associated with Renault.

C.N. Administratia Porturilor Maritime S.A. Constanta, known as Portul Constanta, is a Romanian public company that operates as a maritime and river port authority, managing and overseeing the ports of Constanta, Midia, Mangalia, and Tomis. The company provides port management, cargo handling, and related services, including dry bulk, container, general cargo, liquid bulk, and roll-on/roll-off operations. It also functions as a transit hub for agricultural products and serves as a free port. The company is part of the Romanian maritime port sector and is supported by European Union funds for the naval sector.

Bunge Romania is ISO certified and holds additional certifications such as FSCC, KOSHER, EFISC, ISCC EU, and ISCC PLUS.

Aurelo Eclat, known as Aurelo Packaging Co, is an Australian company engaged in eco-friendly skincare and beauty packaging, including sustainable glass dropper bottles, caps, and packaging for serums, face oils, and cosmetics. Jincheng Wenjing Packaging, DBA Wenjing Packaging, is a Chinese manufacturer specialized in the design, production, and sale of cosmetic packaging, including cosmetic jars, foam bottles, lotion bottles, spray bottles, airless bottles, and cosmetic tubes for skincare and personal care products. Yiwu Yijie Packaging Products Co., Ltd. is a Chinese trading company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of packaging products, including plastic, glass, and paper-based packaging solutions. Shenzhen Itop Cosmetic Packaging Co., Ltd. is a Chinese manufacturing company engaged in cosmetic packaging solutions. The company serves a global market, focusing on the cosmetics industry and providing customized packaging products such as bottles, jars, tubes, and accessories.

Standard Mold.net, Inc. is a South Korean company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of cosmetic packaging and containers for the cosmetics industry. Flextribe is a company engaged in eco-friendly honeycomb packing paper and reusable packaging solutions for fragile items such as electronics, home décor, and accessories. Hangzhou Sunshine Packaging Technology Co., Ltd., DBA Sunshine Packaging, is a Chinese company specialized in the design, manufacturing, and export of eco-friendly cosmetics packaging solutions. Sunshine Packaging serves a global market, collaborating with suppliers to offer a wide range of product styles and operates internationally with offices in the USA, UK, Canada, France, Germany, Thailand, Australia, Netherlands, UAE, and Japan. The company is also engaged in research and development, holds multiple international patents and trademarks, and emphasizes environmentally responsible packaging.

description: Fengyang Pengen Technology Co., Ltd. (阜阳朋能科技有限公司), DBA Fengyang Pengen (阜阳朋能), is a Chinese technology company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion batteries and battery cells, including cathode materials, electrolytes, and battery packs. The company also provides battery leasing services and operates as a vertically integrated manufacturer covering the entire lithium-ion battery manufacturing chain from raw materials to battery packs. The company has developed proprietary lithium iron phosphate and ternary battery technologies, and has established subsidiaries in China and the United States.

Rusaccum LLC (ООО «РУСАККУМ»), DBA Rusaccum (Русаккум), is a Russian limited liability company specialized in the development of solid-state batteries, with a focus on lithium-ion batteries and solid-state lithium sources. Rusaccum also conducts expert evaluations of materials and batteries using electrochemical testing and collaborates with scientific and educational institutions to address scientific and technological challenges in the green energy sector, hybrid and electric vehicles, and energy storage applications. The company serves both European and Russian markets.

Greenbatt Technology Holding AG is a Swiss company engaged in battery technology, with a focus on lithium-ion and solid-state batteries. The company develops and manufactures battery cells using technologies such as Thick Layer Technology and composite cathodes, and supplies battery solutions for industries including electric vehicles, renewable energy storage, and consumer electronics. Greenbatt Technology also emphasizes sustainability by promoting the recycling and reuse of materials and contributing to the energy transition.

(江苏新锂元科技有限公司), DBA Xinliyuan (新锂元), is a Chinese technology company specialized in the research, development, and production of solid-state lithium batteries, salt lake lithium extraction, and comprehensive recycling of lithium battery materials. description: L'Essinganaise is a French company specialized in the manufacturing and online sale of prepared and cooked African dishes, including traditional African cuisine, soups, and beverages. The company operates as both a food manufacturer and a service provider in the food industry, focusing on authentic African cuisine. L'Essinganaise serves customers across France and emphasizes traditional African recipes prepared with exotic and ethnic spices sourced directly from Africa, using organic ingredients and aseptic processing.
Paniers d'Eve is a French food manufacturer operating in crop growing, fruit and vegetable processing, and truck farming.

Société Coopérative d’Intérêt Collectif (SCIC), DBA LA MULTILOCALE, is a French cooperative society specialized in regenerative agriculture, food processing, and the promotion of a circular economy. The organization focuses on hyperlocal and local food production, supports local entrepreneurship, and collaborates with enterprises, local authorities, associations, consumers, and training organizations to develop multi-actor territorial projects. LA MULTILOCALE also operates as a business-to-business service provider, supplying food products and offering a platform for entrepreneurs and community members to participate in its initiatives.

Domaine Godeau is a French beverage manufacturer and wine producer operating in the food production sector. The company is based in Beaulieu-sur-Layon, Pays de la Loire, France, and specializes in the manufacturing of beverages and food products.
Famille Pouille is a French company specialized in the manufacturing and production of food and beverage products. The company operates primarily in the food and beverage sector.

AUDEBERT BOISSONS Société par actions simplifiée, DBA Auvergnat Cola, is a French beverage manufacturer and distributor specialized in the production and distribution of regional beverages, with a primary focus on the Auvergne region. The company offers a range of soft drinks, including cola, lemonade, and tonic, made with locally sourced ingredients and traditional production methods. Auvergnat Cola also operates in bottling and packaging, with an emphasis on sustainability and eco-friendly practices.

INOU is a French company engaged in the production and sale of fruits, with a focus on pressing and processing these fruits into various products. The company operates in Paris and serves the French market.

GreenLeaf Mate is a French company specialized in the production and distribution of natural, energy-boosting beverages based on maté. The company offers its products in various formats, including single servings, cocktails, and post-workout options, targeting consumers seeking healthier alternatives to traditional energy drinks. GreenLeaf Mate operates as both a beverage manufacturer and distributor, with all production and bottling activities conducted in France. The company emphasizes sustainability by using recyclable glass bottles and eco-friendly packaging.

Riviera Kombucha is a French company engaged in the production and distribution of kombucha beverages, with a focus on artisanal and locally sourced ingredients. The company operates as a food manufacturer and tea producer, offering its products to both professional and individual consumers in the French Riviera region. Riviera Kombucha emphasizes natural fermentation methods and the use of locally available plants, vegetables, and fruits in its brewing processes.

Dechelette Estate is a French beverage manufacturer and food producer operating in the food production sector. The company specializes in winemaking, aging, bottling, and distribution management, serving the wine and food industry. It operates in the most prestigious terroirs of France.

description: KVA Wind Int. ApS, DBA KVA Wind, is a Danish company specialized in the production and installation of residential wind turbines and the provision of renewable energy solutions. The company primarily serves the Danish market, offering services such as turbine placement consultation, energy production calculations, and noise compliance assessments. KVA Wind also provides maintenance and service for various types of residential wind turbines, including Vestas, KVA Vind, and DTU Vindenergi models, and is approved by the Danish Energy Agency's Approval Committee for turbine maintenance. Additionally, the company offers generator installations through its subsidiary, KVA-Diesel.dk.

David Nyren is a Swedish company specialized in the production and installation of solar panels, as well as the provision of educational services related to renewable energy. The company serves both residential and commercial clients, including those in the construction sector, and operates a solar panel production facility. It also offers educational services for individuals interested in renewable energy solutions.

description: Enercon is a Swedish wind turbine builder operating in the renewable energy sector, specializing in the construction of wind turbines.

Sola Markis & Persienn Ab is a Swedish company engaged in the production and sale of solar panels and related products, with a focus on renewable energy solutions. The company operates as both a manufacturer and distributor, serving individual and business customers interested in solar energy. It is also active as a store, offering solar energy products to customers in Sweden.

Kraftkar Energi AS, DBA Kraftkar Energi, is a Norwegian company specialized in renewable energy solutions, with a focus on solar energy. The company provides solar energy products and services, including outdoor solar panels, building-integrated photovoltaics, and free-standing solar panels, serving residential, industrial, commercial, and off-grid energy needs. Kraftkar Energi also operates as a supplier of green energy and offers installation and maintenance services for solar panels, as well as after-sales support and building-integrated solutions. The company is part of the Med enerett group, which is involved in renewable energy projects and initiatives.

Lundeseter Solcellepark is a Norwegian business entity specialized in the development and production of solar panels, operating as a service provider in the renewable energy sector with a focus on solar energy projects. The company targets renewable energy consumers and environmental stakeholders, and is engaged in sustainable development and community support initiatives.

Navitas is a Danish consultancy firm engaged in renewable energy engineering and business consultancy. The company provides advisory services for renewable projects, including feasibility studies, design, procurement, construction, operation and maintenance, contract review, site supervision, commissioning, and technical due diligence. Navitas also engages in renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing and owners engineering, supporting large-scale international projects in areas such as wind energy, photovoltaic systems, geothermal heating and cooling, solar thermal, and solar energy.

Sverdrup Energy Norge AS, known as SVENO, is a Norwegian company engaged in solutions for fastening structures to rock, with a focus on sustainable and efficient rock adapter designs for wind turbines. The company also provides wind turbine foundations, foundation repair, and green building design services, serving industrial companies, renewable energy investors, and green construction firms across Europe.

Sol Industries also offers a software platform for workflow optimization and monitoring, supporting satellite connectivity for remote management.

description: Carita och Torbjörn is a Swedish company specialized in the production and sale of wind power equipment and related services. The company operates a wind power park in Kronoberget, serving customers interested in renewable energy solutions.

Bluetec Vest AS is a Norwegian company engaged in the manufacturing of solar panel systems and renewable energy solutions, with a focus on solar energy. The company serves private individuals and businesses in the Vestland region of Norway, providing products such as solar cell panels, inverters, and fixed equipment, as well as energy consulting and implementation services. BlueTec Vest also undertakes solar installation projects for private individuals and agricultural farms, with an emphasis on sustainability and climate goals aligned with EU targets.

Home Energy also operates as a service provider for the maintenance and support of its renewable energy products.

description: Tesla Ocean Turbine is a Swedish renewable energy company specialized in the development and deployment of tidal energy harvesting systems. The company focuses on providing solutions for renewable energy investors and stakeholders seeking cost-effective and scalable tidal energy systems. Its operations include project development and deployment of tidal energy technologies, with a particular emphasis on cost reduction and environmental impact reduction.

description: IKM InWind AS, DBA IKM InWind, is a Norwegian company operating in the renewable energy sector, specializing in maintenance and inspection services, as well as the manufacturing of renewable energy semiconductors. The company provides services related to drivetrain components, mechanical and electrical rotating equipment, and high voltage applications, supporting the reliability and efficiency of renewable energy infrastructure.
core_offerings: Field Service Support for Renewable Energy Infrastructure
High Voltage Equipment Inspection and Repair

description: Folksol Stockholm AB, DBA Folksol, is a Swedish company specialized in solar energy solutions, focusing on solar panels, smart batteries, and off-grid energy systems. The company operates as both a service provider and product manufacturer in the renewable energy sector, serving residential and off-grid energy consumers primarily in Sweden. Folksol emphasizes sustainability and energy efficiency in its operations.

Société des Produits Nestlé S.A., DBA Nestlé Health Science, is a Swiss company specialized in nutritional science and health solutions. The company operates in the healthcare sector, offering products such as medical nutrition, active lifestyle nutrition, and pharmaceutical solutions for various life stages, including pediatrics and healthy aging. Nestlé Health Science serves clients in over 140 countries and maintains a global supply chain with multiple factories and a network of scientific researchers and developers. The company is also involved in research and development and has a presence in the e-health and e-commerce domains.

Sumitomo Pharma Switzerland GmbH is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of pharmaceutical products, with a focus on oncology, urology, women’s health, rare diseases, cell and gene therapies, and central nervous system disorders. The company also conducts research and development activities, including drug discovery and product development, and is involved in co-promotion agreements. Sumitomo Pharma Switzerland serves markets in the U.S., Canada, and Europe, and is part of a global network of subsidiaries and affiliates supporting its operations in these regions.

Lonza Group Ltd, known as Lonza Capsules & Health Ingredients, is a Swiss pharmaceutical and nutraceutical company engaged in capsule design, manufacturing, and encapsulation technology. The company provides products such as hard empty capsules, encapsulation equipment, and specialty health ingredients, serving customers in the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries worldwide. Lonza Capsules & Health Ingredients also offers technical and regulatory support, as well as manufacturing and technical services related to capsule design and encapsulation.

Idorsia Pharmaceuticals Ltd is a Swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the discovery, development, and commercialization of small molecule therapeutics. The company operates in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors, with activities including research and development, medical and pharmaceutical manufacturing, and the commercialization of pharmaceutical products. Idorsia serves global markets through subsidiaries in multiple countries and is publicly traded on the Swiss stock exchange.

Stallergenes Greer International AG is a Swiss biopharmaceutical company engaged in the diagnosis and treatment of allergies through allergen immunotherapy. The company develops and commercializes products for respiratory, food, and veterinary allergies, including sublingual and subcutaneous allergen immunotherapy, oral immunotherapy for peanut allergies, and veterinary allergen immunotherapy. Stallergenes Greer operates globally, with a presence in the Nordic region and affiliates in multiple countries, and is involved in research and development, as well as the commercialization of allergy therapeutics.
